title: Diabetes partners and links - Canada.ca
content:
## Diabetes partners and links
- Canadian Cardiovascular Society
- Canadian Institute for Health Information
- Canadian National Institute of the Blind (CNIB)
- Canadian Medical Association
- Canadian Mental Health Association
- Canadian Nurses Association
- Canadian Public Health Association
- Canadian Society of Exercise Physiology
- Childhood Healthy Living Foundation
- Diabetes Action Canada
- Dietitians of Canada
- FRED Foundation ( Fondation ressources pour les enfants diabétique s)
- Heart and Stroke Foundation of Canada
- Indigenous Physicians Association of Canada (IPAC)
- International Diabetes Federation
- National Indigenous Diabetes Association (NIDA)
- National Collaborating Centre of Public Health
- Public Health Physicians of Canada
- The Kidney Foundation of Canada
- World Health Organization (WHO)
This list of resources is not exhaustive and will be updated over time.
